title: 8.37. PROGRESS REPORT ON WORKING OF RSETIs AS AT JUNE 2016 Sl. No. | District | Sponsor Bank | Date of Establishment | Land Allotment Position | NIRD Grant Details
headers: 8.37. PROGRESS REPORT ON WORKING OF RSETIs AS AT JUNE 2016
rows: (1) Request for corporation permit submitted after clarifying objections raised by them (2) Revised estimate submitted to Central Office of IOB for approval.
Rs. 39.36 lakhs released so far towards construction of permanent premises
Rural Development Commissioner has offered land at ETC campus, Kottarakkara. Bank has communicated the acceptance of the offer
Rs. 1 crore released. First Instalment of Rs. 50 lakhs availed on 11.09.2009
Land with building allotted on 09.12.2013. Block Panchayath, Pandalam obtained stay order from High Court from getting possession. To be got vacated. Taken up with District Administration also.

50cents of land allotted and demarked at Aryad Block Panchayat. Building Permit from Mannancherry Panchayath obtained on 11.06.2012. Proceedings started for construction of the Building. Construction work entrusted with Central Public Works Department (CPWD) and first instalment Rs. 29,58,833/- DD dt. 20.12.2013 handed over to Executive Engineer CPWD on 23.12.2013. Soil test conducted. Trees cutting over and ground is ready for construction. Subsequently, as per the letter dated 08.10.2014 received from Supg. Engineer CPWD, the actual cost of work as per detailed estimate is Rs.1,06,75,075/- which is more than 10% of Rs 88.76 lakhs already accorded. Head Office (AGM Premises) replied on 14.10.2014 to keep the construction as a ‘load bearing' structure as already discussed during finalisation of lay out plan so as to bring the estimated cost within the sanction already granted. As per instructions received from Head office, NIRD/MoRD is insisting on construction of building with 8000 sq.ft only as against our approved area of 3700 sq.ft. The construction cost exceeding Rs. 1.00 crores has to be met by the bank and the work can be commenced only after obtaining a suitable direction in this regard.

50 cents of land has been allotted and taken possession in the Pallom block panchayath premises. The trees have to be cut and removed with the approval of forest department. Meanwhile, due to non handing over of the site, CPWD has returned the work tender awarded to them.
Tender has been floated and bids invited for the construction of RSETI
Rs. 50 lakhs credited to account on 30.07.2010. Amount not yet availed

Revised ‘MOU’ executed for 50 cents of land as per Govt. guidelines on 10.02.2012. Building Plan submitted to Mazhuvannoor Grama Panchayath on 12.09.2013 was approved on 07.10.2013. Construction nearing completion.
1st instalment of Rs. 50 lakhs less TDS = Rs.48.95 lakhs received on 11.09.2009
Construction work completed. Due for Inauguration.

Land identified and willingness given by Parli Grama Panchayath. The concerned file is now with Revenue Department. The District Collector & Project Officer, Palakkd reported that without transferring ownership, MOU can be signed for which Govt Order is to be issued. Lead Bank, SLBC and S D R is following up in this regard.
Own land and old campus. New building work completed
Land is allotted and felling of trees is over.
Rs. 10 lakhs during October 2009. Rs. 40 lakhs during April 2011.
Building completed and functioning in the new building from 01.02.2011 onwards

We have 1.5 acres of land owned by us in Bellikoth Village, and plans and Estimate for the Additional constructions are under preparation. The Existing building of our own measuring around 7500 Square feet is equipped to conduct classes for the majority of the courses.
